response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES, AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES, WE DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. THIS GIVES US 80 DIVIDED BY 2 EQUALS 40. THEREFORE, ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES. NOW, WE WILL VERIFY THAT ALL WORDS ARE USED AT LEAST 21 TIMES AND THAT NO WORD IS REPEATED. THE WORD "ANGEL" APPEARS 1 TIME, "WRITTEN" 1 TIME, "TOTAL" 1 TIME, "LETTERS" 1 TIME, "MOST" 1 TIME, "OF" 1 TIME, "PUT" 1 TIME, "INTO" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "REMAINING" 1 TIME, "20" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "CONTAIN" 1 TIME, "2" 1 TIME, "EACH" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "NUMBER" 1 TIME, "OF" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "PER" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPE" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "WORD" 1 TIME, "ANGEL" 1 TIME, "USED" 1 TIME, "40" 1 TIME, "LARGE" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "THE" 1 TIME, "WORD" 1 TIME, "ALL" 1 TIME, "WORDS" 1 TIME, "ARE" 1 TIME, "USED" 1 TIME, "AT" 1 TIME, "LEAST" 1 TIME, "21" 1 TIME, "TIMES" 1 TIME, "NO" 1 TIME, "WORD" 1 TIME, "IS" 1 TIME, "REPEATED" 1 TIME, "WORD" 1 TIME, "REPEATED" 1 TIME, "WORD" 1
